meaning: His Master's Voice(英国)"主人之声"牌唱片
examples: Simon Fox, the HMV chief executive, said
The labels need HMV to survive in order to keep lucrative non-chart music on the high street.
HMV also recorded the conductor during live performances at Convent Garden in London and in Paris during 1937.
It is not yet known what will happen to HMV's branches and 4, 350 staff.
HMV, which seems to have recently survived by the skin of its teeth, is a listed business.
